title: Eedu Gold Ehe
overview: Bangarraju is an innocent & good-hearted person he leaves for Hyderabad in search of job,Meeting an elderly woman who helps him get a job,he lands in trouble from a lookalike Sunil Varma who robs a Diamond-studded idol from a mafia don's house,are they both twins or is sunil varma actually bangarraju ?
